title: Crocodeilanthe tepuiensis
taxonomy: Crocodeilanthe tepuiensis is a member of the orchid family, specifically within the subfamily Epidendroideae. It is classified under the genus Crocodeilanthe. This genus is further grouped under the tribe Epidendreae. Within this tribe, Crocodeilanthe tepuiensis falls under the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and genetic relationships.
preparations: I couldn't find any specific information about herbal preparations of Crocodeilanthe tepuiensis.
intro: There is no information available on the plant Crocodeilanthe tepuiensis.
